reviews.review_title: Four stars let’s make it five?
reviews.review_description: The reason I say four instead of five is because I think you should add electric guitars and remove the fire sounds…. I don’t mean my guitar ￼
I was soooo happy when i found sheet music for space oddity by bowie. This is amazing, worth getting
Super hard to play anything, the background is kinda weird, overall just kinda meh.

reviews.review_title: Get rid of the fire sound effect
reviews.review_description:
I know this is no simulator, however I would really appreciate it if you give us the option to mute that fireplace sound... That say this could be used to play some music live.

Thank you!

5 stars for the pick of destiny
Lots of small details, like the sound of a pick inside the guitar which all guitarists and relate to XD.
